name.x-prompt: What would you like to call your TypeScript project?

directory.description: Parent directory where the library is placed.
directory.x-prompt: Which directory do you want to create the library in?

subDirectory.description: The sub directory the lib is placed in. By default this is the library name.
subDirectory.x-prompt: Which sub directory do you want to create the library in? (By default this is the library name)

module.description: Module format for generated TypeScript code and configuration. 'infer' uses ESM if the workspace root package.json is 'type': 'module', otherwise CommonJS. An explicit 'esm'/'cjs' that conflicts with the workspace's existing format is rejected, since the format is workspace-wide.

preferInstallDependencies.description: Whether to prefer installing dependencies after the generator runs. Set to false to defer installing when batching multiple generators (an install still runs if needed so subsequent generators can compute the Nx project graph); install once at the end.
